title: Bloxy's Skills
description: Adds a Vanilla+ skill-based system to Minecraft!
body:
# **Bloxy's Skills**

This mod adds a skill-based system without changing the vanilla gameplay/progression, allowing players to upgrade their Attributes by spending **Skill Points,** earnable by doing actions that give XP or by mining blocks. With no limits too, allowing you to endlessly upgrade your skills.

![Press the icons to upgrade the selected Skill](https://i.imgur.com/hNc2B2i.png)

**You can upgrade the following Attributes with Skill Points:**    
- **Strength**: Increases melee damage.
- **Max Hearts**: Boosts your maximum health by half-a-heart.
- **Mining Speed**: Break blocks faster.
- **Movement Speed**: Increased movement speed.
- **Feather Falling**: Reduces fall damage.
- **Water Breathing**: Breath underwater longer.

**Skill points** are directly linked to the **experience** you gain ingame. As an example, for every **5 XP** earned from actions such as killing mobs, you receive **0.05 Skill Points**. Once you accumulate atleast **1 Skill Point**, you can use it to upgrade your skills. **Skill points** can also be earned by breaking blocks, the harder the blocks are to break the more you earn.

You can view the Skills GUI via the `G` key _(Rebindable in Controls/Keybinds menu)._  
You can toggle between using **Skill points** or Refunding **Skill Points** with the Green button at the top-left of your Minecraft Skin

The mod can be put on any modpack, both for personal and commercial use.   
The mod is made with MCreator.
